description_id: Scheduler paling simpel: rating langsung menentukan interval dasar. Cocok untuk launch awal.
notes: Use this first. Easy to implement, debug, and explain to users.

description_id: Interval dihitung dari interval lama × ease factor × rating modifier.
notes: Useful when you want more dynamic intervals without FSRS.

description_id: Preset metadata untuk migrasi ke FSRS setelah review history cukup banyak.
notes: Enable after you have enough review logs. Keep desired retention conservative.
